What is IMAC in ICRDrag?

IMAC (Image-Mask Attention Consistency) enforces that, for each target patch, the attention over the source image mirrors the attention of the corresponding target-mask patch over the source mask. This grounds the visual generation on the spatial structures defined by the masks, and is implemented as an MSE between the two attention maps.

What is the two-stage training in ICRDrag?

ICRDrag uses a two-stage curriculum. Stage 1 trains on complete region masks (all semantic regions separated). Stage 2 fine-tunes on incomplete region masks (only partial regions retained, the rest filled gray, with random dilation), simulating sparse real-world user inputs and going from easy to hard.

What is STAC in ICRDrag?

STAC (Source-Target Attention Correspondence) enforces mutual attention: if a target patch attends to a source patch, that source patch should attend back to the same target patch. It is implemented by minimizing the negative trace of the product of the target-to-source and source-to-target attention matrices, which preserves fine-grained source details.

What is shift-variant degradation?

In shift-variant degradation the PSF depends on the spatial location, so the blur characteristics change across the image field and cannot be modeled by a single convolution. The degradation must be represented by a large, position-dependent linear operator, making restoration an ill-conditioned inverse problem that conventional Fourier-domain deconvolution cannot solve.

What rewards does ShutterMuse use in GRPO?

Photographer-side uses two rewards: a decision reward Rdec for predicting the correct refine/keep/reject category, and a mask reward Rmask that checks whether a refined box preserves the salient subject (using a BiRefNet mask with coverage threshold tau_m = 0.9). Subject-side uses Rsub, which rewards an exact match of the predicted visibility vector to the ground truth.

How is naturalness varied at fixed content?

The authors build an invertible encoder whose only adjustable component is a spectral exponent beta, with power proportional to |f|^-beta. Varying beta moves the image toward or away from the natural-image manifold while keeping the encoded signal fixed; beta=2 reproduces the 1/f^2 spectrum of natural images.

Describe the WorldStream corpus.

WorldStream is a corpus of 299 heterogeneous real-world current-value series collected from key-free public APIs (weather, air quality, earthquakes, gold and oil, equities, cryptocurrencies, foreign exchange, community attention, and space weather), grouped into nine source families. It yields 3143 temporally split windows for a nine-way source-recognition task.

How was the subject-side data built?

SGGP is the subject-side guidance generation pipeline. Portraits are converted into person-free scenes using Nano-Banana-Pro, keypoints are extracted with a YOLO-based pose estimator (YOLO26x-Pose) in COCO-17 format, and Gemini-3.0-Pro writes pose-recommendation rationales. Annotators review and correct keypoints, visibility, and rationales, yielding 30K person-free scenes with verified annotations.

What are the main findings of OCR-Robust?

Five findings: (1) closed-source models lead in overall robustness; (2) higher clean accuracy does not guarantee stronger robustness; (3) structured content (charts, tables) is substantially more fragile than documents, with average worst-case retention dropping from 0.826 on OCR1.0 to 0.676 on OCR2.0; (4) OCR+LLM pipelines are sensitive to OCR extraction quality; and (5) chain-of-thought prompting improves clean accuracy but not worst-case robustness.

What is the energy-retention criterion?

The number of retained singular values is selected so that a target percentage of the cumulative singular-value energy is preserved; the paper uses a 99% energy-retention criterion. Components tied to small singular values are not removed but attenuated by weighting factors derived from the singular-value magnitudes, reducing noise amplification while preserving useful image information.

Give an overview of ShutterMuse.

ShutterMuse is a unified multimodal large language model (MLLM) for capture-time photography guidance. It supports both photographer-side guidance (composition decision and refinement) and subject-side guidance (scene-conditioned pose recommendation). It is built on Qwen3-VL-8B and trained with supervised fine-tuning followed by reinforcement fine-tuning.

What is the total loss in ICRDrag?

The total loss is the flow-matching loss plus weighted IMAC and STAC terms: L_total = L_flow + lambda1*L_imac + lambda2*L_stac. The auxiliary losses are computed from attention maps in the 7th-11th transformer layers (NextDiT has 16 layers) and applied throughout the denoising process.

What did phase scrambling show?

Phase scrambling holds the power spectrum exactly fixed while removing local structure. Then FID and accuracy fall together (Pearson -0.89). What is the linear model in the SVD paper?

The discrete degradation is modeled as g = Hf + epsilon, where f is the original image vector, g is the observed image vector, H is the shift-variant degradation matrix (different PSFs in different rows, so it is not Toeplitz), and epsilon is additive random noise. SVD of H is used to invert the system in a stable way.

How does the paper choose how many singular values to keep?

The number of retained singular values is selected so that a target percentage of the cumulative singular-value energy is preserved; the paper uses a 99% energy-retention criterion. Components tied to small singular values are not removed but attenuated by weighting factors derived from the singular-value magnitudes, reducing noise amplification while preserving useful image information.

Why is shift-variant blur hard to restore?

In shift-variant degradation the PSF depends on the spatial location, so the blur characteristics change across the image field and cannot be modeled by a single convolution. The degradation must be represented by a large, position-dependent linear operator, making restoration an ill-conditioned inverse problem that conventional Fourier-domain deconvolution cannot solve.

Existing aesthetic cropping benchmarks mainly evaluate post-hoc crop prediction and assume every image can be improved by cropping, overlooking subject-side recommendations and cases where cropping is unnecessary. ShutterMuse provides interactive guidance during image capture for both camera framing and subject pose.

Explain the Source-Target Attention Correspondence loss.

STAC (Source-Target Attention Correspondence) enforces mutual attention: if a target patch attends to a source patch, that source patch should attend back to the same target patch. It is implemented by minimizing the negative trace of the product of the target-to-source and source-to-target attention matrices, which preserves fine-grained source details.

What is the naturalness/transferability paper about?

How is the degradation modeled mathematically?

The discrete degradation is modeled as g = Hf + epsilon, where f is the original image vector, g is the observed image vector, H is the shift-variant degradation matrix (different PSFs in different rows, so it is not Toeplitz), and epsilon is additive random noise. SVD of H is used to invert the system in a stable way.

Which layers are the losses applied to?

What is the recognition task in the naturalness paper?

The task is nine-way source-family recognition: given a window's image, identify the family that produced it. Windows are length L=192 at stride 64, near-constant windows are discarded, and each window is z-scored so only shape and temporal structure remain. The split is temporal (earliest 70% train, latest 30% test), giving 2322 training and 821 test windows.

How does the proposed method differ from TSVD?

Truncated SVD (TSVD) discards components associated with small singular values, and its restoration quality is very sensitive to the truncation threshold. The proposed method instead retains those components but attenuates them with scaling factors phi_i = omega_i / omega_K, giving a physically meaningful, energy-based way to control noise amplification.

How were perturbations selected?
